{{Quote|On my right is Sakhisakh clan Tlakh'sar.|Leia Organa Solo|<ref name="Vision of the Future" />}}
'''Clan Tlakh'sar''' was a [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] clan. One member of clan Tlakh'sar, [[Sakhisakh]], served as [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] politician [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]].<ref name="Vision of the Future" />

{{Stub}}

==Appearances==
